emotional_tone: Playful, friendly, encouraging, and approachable. Reduces the anxiety of 'results' and 'grading'.

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border-2 border-emerald-100 shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(167,243,208,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_12px_32px_rgba(167,243,208,0.6)] transition-all duration-300
surface_strategies.buttons_primary: bg-emerald-400 text-emerald-950 font-bold hover:bg-emerald-500 shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(52,211,153,0.4)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform
surface_strategies.inputs: bg-emerald-50/50 border-2 border-emerald-100 focus:border-emerald-400 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-emerald-400/20 text-emerald-900 outline-none h-12 px-4

iconography.usage: Use emojis heavily in the UI to make it cute (e.g., 🎒, 📚, 🍏, 🌟, 🏆, 📝)

images_and_media.instructions: Use these images for background patterns or placeholders if needed. Do not use generic grey boxes.

Dashboard.layout: Grid layout. Top section uses 3 big summary bento-cards (Total Students, Average Score, Top Performers). Use emojis in titles.
Dashboard.style: Header section should feel welcoming, perhaps with the 'hero_background' as a very subtle faded overlay.

Students_List.layout: Searchable data display. Instead of strict enterprise tables, use a bento-grid of student cards OR a very soft table with alternating green-tinted rows and rounded corners.
Students_List.interactions: Hover states on rows/cards should slightly lift them.

Add_Edit_Form.layout: Floating modal/card with soft UI. Generous padding (p-8).
Add_Edit_Form.style: Big bold labels. For subjects, use a 2-column grid layout for inputs so it doesn't feel overwhelmingly long.

Student_Detail.layout: Hero section showing student info (Avatar, Name, Standard). Followed by a responsive grid of subject cards showing marks and a dynamic grade-based emoji.

component_overrides.shadcn_card: Override default rounded-xl to rounded-3xl. Add border-emerald-100. Apply soft green shadows.
component_overrides.shadcn_button: Override rounded-md to rounded-full. Increase font-weight to bold. Add hover bounce (-translate-y-1).
component_overrides.shadcn_input: Override to rounded-2xl, h-12, bg-emerald-50/50. No sharp corners.
component_overrides.shadcn_table: Remove strict dark borders. Use soft emerald dividing lines or just background coloring for rows.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Font 'Nunito' and set it as the sans font family in tailwind.config.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
Do not use dark tech-mint themes. The background is cream (#FDFBF7), primary is vibrant green (#4ADE80).
Replace standard dashboard seriousness with cute emojis and generous padding (p-6 to p-8 inside cards).
Export functionality (PDF/CSV) buttons should be prominent and styled playfully.
There is no auth, just UI toggles or separate views if needed for Teacher vs Student view, or simply open access. Treat everyone as having access.
